content.heroSubtitle: Experience the vibrant Baakisimba dance, local cuisine, and the rich heritage of the Bakiga.
content.aboutText: Tugyedane Kigezi Festival, under the theme 'Celebrating Identity, Strengthening Unity', emphasizes cultural preservation, community unity, and socioeconomic empowerment.
content.highlight2Desc: Taste authentic dishes like Empengere,Emondi,Ebiribwa,Omugusha Obushera and bringing Kigezi to your plate.
